resources:
SuperBeeApp App Logo
Step 1: Location Details 1. Village/Town, Tehsil, District, State 2. Latitude and Longitude 3. Altitude (m) 4. Surrounding Next
Step 2: Crop Details 1. Crop Name 2. Variety/Hybrid 3. Type (Rainfed/Irrigated) 4. Spacing (row(m) × plant(m)) / plant population (No/ha) 5. Date of Sowing DD/MM/YYYY 6. Stage of Crop (as on date of spraying) 7. Shaded Area (%, if measured OR fully, partly, sparsely based on observations) Back Next
Step 3: Drone Details 1. Classification (Small/Medium/Large) 2. Category (Multi-rotor/Hybrid) and No. of Rotors 3. Maximum Take-off Weight (kg) 4. Power Source (Battery-mAh/Fuel-type) 5. Other Specifications (Control range, endurance, flight time, controller, fail-safe features) 6. Photographs of the drone model used in spraying Choose Photo Back Next
Step 4: Spraying System Details Tank Capacity (lit) Nozzle Mounting (on boom/below propeller) Length of boom (m) Number of Nozzles Type of Nozzle Cone Angle Droplet Size (μm) Discharge / Flow rate (lit/min) Operating Pressure (kg/Cm²) Back Next
Step 5-A: Formulations Sprayed
Target Disease/Pest Type of Formulation Name of Pesticide Concentration (gai/lit or % or ml) Dosage (g/ha or ml/ha) Water Volume (lit/ha)
Back Next
Step 5-B: Crop nutrients (chemical nutrients / bio-fertilizers)
Target deficiency Type of formulation Name of crop nutrient Type of nutrient (nano/micro/macro) Concentration (g ai/lit or % or ml/lit) Dosage (g/ha or ml/ha) Water volume (lit/ha)
Back Next
Step 6-A: Environment Temperature (°C) Relative Humidity (%) Wind Speed (km/hr) and Direction
Back Next
Step 6-B: Drone Operating Parameters Flight Modes (Manual/Autonomous/A-B mode) Height above Canopy (m) Swath (m) Overlap (%) Spray Width (m) Flight Direction (Windward/Leeward) Time of Spray (start and end) Multiple Flight Details
Back Next
Step 6-C: Drone Operating Parameters Field Capacity - Theoretical (ha/hr) Field Capacity - Actual (ha/hr) Volume Median Diameter VMD (μm) Number Median Diameter NMD (μm) Droplet Density (No./cm²) Spray Uniformity (%) Control Efficiency (%) Phyto-toxicity Observations/Effects Efficacy Other Observations
Back Submit
//summary fragment ✅ Thank you!! Form submitted successfully" SOP Recap 🚀 LAUNCH QGC ← BACK TO DASHBOARD 📄 DOWNLOAD PDF
//splash activity SuperBee Drone Management
//login activity SUPERBEE AERONAUTICS Login LOG IN New user? Sign Up here
